title: Complementary Third Life
body:
# Description A game about surviving until the bitter end, where every decision brings you closer to victory—or elimination. Each player begins with **three lives**. - **4–6 lives:** dark green name - **3 lives:** green name - **2 lives:** yellow name - **1 life:** red name When you reach your final life, your name turns red—and you gain the power to **kill other players**. # Items
**Heart** ![heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8b4f244112baa35ae901925e7b58a3e11c0573a.png) Grants user an extra life **Heart Extractor** ![heart_extractor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5546462e2232a7ee3f1aa1bf78a7026350e11307.png) A tool capable of ripping a heart from your own body, creating a tangible Heart item to give—or to trade. **Phantom Heart** ![phantom_heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57148967fb276767f7a13fd320645b5d266a009a.png) Grants a **temporary life** lasting **five minutes**, before fading away. **Tome of Rebirth** ![rebirth_tome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c782a9c2b719a79458746310757a3fe74b1b0ff2.png) A rare artifact that, when used, **resurrects a random player**—for better or worse.
# Resourcepack If using the datapack, be sure to install the [resourcepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eternal-resourcepack) # Information [[Click Here]](https://eternalstudios.net/Complementary+Third+Life/Recipes) to **view the recipes**. [[Click Here]](https://eternalstudios.net/Complementary+Third+Life/Q%26A) for **Q&A**
Commands | Admin | | | -------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | | **Action** | **Command** | | Start Game | *function thirdlife:admin/start* | | Uninstall | *function thirdlife:admin/uninstall* | | Give Heart | *function thirdlife:admin/give/heart* | | Give Heart Extractor | *function thirdlife:admin/give/heart_extractor* | | Give Phantom Heart | *function thirdlife:admin/give/phantom_heart* | | Give Tome of Rebirth | *function thirdlife:admin/give/rebirth_tome* | ___ | Players | | | ---------------- | -------------------- | | **Action** | **Command** | | View Life Status | *trigger LifeStatus* |
